description_zh: 古馳（Gucci）是全球最具影响力的意大利奢侈时装品牌之一，1921年由古驰奥·古驰在佛罗伦萨创立。品牌最初以优质皮具和马术灵感的设计著称，双G标志和红绿条纹织带成为其最具识别度的品牌符号。古驰在20世纪五六十年代凭借竹节手柄包、乐福鞋和丝巾等经典单品风靡好莱坞与全球名流。历经家族纷争与多次创意变革，品牌在汤姆·福特（1994-2004）和亚历山德罗·米凯莱（2015-2023）两任创意总监的带领下先后实现惊人复兴，重新成为千禧世代和Z世代最追捧的奢侈品牌之一。如今古驰隶属于开云集团（Kering），产品覆盖成衣、皮具、鞋履、配饰、珠宝、腕表、香水和美妆，年营收近百亿欧元。品牌以大胆的意大利浪漫主义、复古与未来交织的美学独树一帜。

languages.en: Gucci is one of the world's most influential Italian luxury fashion houses, founded in 1921 by Guccio Gucci in Florence. Initially renowned for fine leather goods and equestrian-inspired designs, the double-G logo and green-red-green web stripe became its most recognizable brand signatures. In the 1950s and 1960s, Gucci captivated Hollywood and global elites with iconic pieces like the bamboo-handle bag, loafers, and silk scarves. After family turmoil, the brand experienced remarkable revivals under Tom Ford (1994-2004) and Alessandro Michele (2015-2023), becoming one of the most sought-after luxury brands among millennials and Gen Z. Now owned by Kering, Gucci spans ready-to-wear, leather goods, shoes, accessories, jewelry, watches, fragrances, and beauty, with annual revenue approaching €10 billion. It is distinguished by bold Italian romanticism and a unique blend of vintage and futuristic aesthetics.
